[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A man in a dark suit holds up a white sign with large black text while a financial chart graphic appears behind him.

Main Subject:
A single man is centered in the image, facing forward, holding a rectangular white paper sign with both hands. The sign contains large bold black text reading “Presiden Guoblok.”

Setting:
The background is a dark, screen-like graphic environment with a green line chart and faint gridlines, suggesting a digital dashboard. The lighting is even on the man, with the chart behind him.

Visual Details:
The man wears a black traditional cap and a dark suit jacket over a white shirt. He has a red necktie with a subtle pattern and a small red-and-white pin on the left side of his jacket. His face is illuminated by soft frontal lighting, showing a neutral expression with a slight smile. He holds the sign at chest height; his fingers grip the left and right edges of the paper. Behind him, a green line graph with circular points rises gradually across the chart area, with small labels and time markers along the top and axis area. The camera angle is straight-on, and the composition is tightly framed around his upper body and the sign.

Visible Text:

Practical Summary:
The image shows a man holding a sign that reads “Presiden Guoblok” in front of a dark background with a rising green financial line chart. Additional dashboard-like text and chart labels are visible around him.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
